description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named clang sanity checks that runs on every push to feature/sanity-checks-for-github-ci and on pull requests to master. Use multiple ubuntu-22.04 jobs to check Clang builds with various C++ standards (C++03, C++11, C++14, C++17, C++20) and STL configurations (with and without STL, and forcing C++03 implementation). Each job checks out the repository, fetches the code, sets up Clang, runs cmake with specific flags, and makes the project.
